revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Efn]]: importing for the list. This is a canonical list of Shrines to work with
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing the refn stuff to try to fix the Okinawa article
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#tag:ref|{{{1}}}|group=lower-alpha}}</includeonly><noinclude>
 
{{Documentation}}
<!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc subpage.-->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#tag:ref|{{{1}}}|group=lower-alpha|name={{{name|}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
 
{{Documentation}}
<!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc subpage.-->
</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
[[ar:قالب: ملاحظة]]
<includeonly>{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|name={{{name|}}}}}|group=lower-alpha}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=upper-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=upper-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=upper-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: add reference as an alias to {{{1}}} so parameters can be passed to this template
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = note
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = note
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{refn|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{refn|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: parameter aliases for cross-compatibility with other templates
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Notifying subject page of move discussion on [[Template talk:Efn#Requested move 31 January 2023|Template talk:Efn]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:Explanatory footnote|2=Template talk:Efn#Requested move 31 January 2023}}
</noinclude><includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|safesubst<noinclude />:group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: now how did that get there?
revision.text:

 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}

   }}
 }}

 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}

   }}}}

<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha

    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}

    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#tag:ref|{{{1}}}|group=lower-alpha}}</includeonly><noinclude>
 
{{Documentation}}
<!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc subpage.-->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#tag:ref|{{{1}}}|group=lower-alpha|name={{{name|}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
 
{{Documentation}}
<!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc subpage.-->
</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
[[ar:قالب: ملاحظة]]
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|name={{{name|}}}}}|group=lower-alpha}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=upper-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=upper-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=upper-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: add reference as an alias to {{{1}}} so parameters can be passed to this template
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = note
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = note
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{refn|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{refn|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: parameter aliases for cross-compatibility with other templates
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Notifying subject page of move discussion on [[Template talk:Efn#Requested move 31 January 2023|Template talk:Efn]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:Explanatory footnote|2=Template talk:Efn#Requested move 31 January 2023}}
</noinclude><includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|safesubst<noinclude />:group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha

    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}

    | #default = lower-alpha

<includeonly>{{#tag:ref|{{{1}}}|group=lower-alpha}}</includeonly><noinclude>
 
{{Documentation}}
<!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc subpage.-->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#tag:ref|{{{1}}}|group=lower-alpha|name={{{name|}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
 
{{Documentation}}
<!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc subpage.-->
</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Effen33|Effen33]] ([[User talk:Effen33|talk]]) to last version by Gadget850
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
[[ar:قالب: ملاحظة]]
<includeonly>{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|name={{{name|}}}}}|group=lower-alpha}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=upper-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=lower-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group=upper-alpha}}|{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group=upper-alpha}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: add reference as an alias to {{{1}}} so parameters can be passed to this template
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = note
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = note
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

</noinclude>

 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha

 }}

revision.comment: parameter aliases for cross-compatibility with other templates
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Notifying subject page of move discussion on [[Template talk:Efn#Requested move 31 January 2023|Template talk:Efn]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:Explanatory footnote|2=Template talk:Efn#Requested move 31 January 2023}}
</noinclude><includeonly>{{#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha

    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}
 }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha

   }}
 }}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]]<!--Doing this to bump these pages because my history retrieval attempts have led to category caching errors-->[[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Ahecht|en>Ahecht]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha

    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}

    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha

    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

</noinclude>

 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}

 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}

   }}}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Efn here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Efn for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{name|}}}
 |{{#tag:ref|{{{1|{{{reference|{{{content|{{{text|}}}}}}}}}}}}|name={{{name|}}}|group={{safesubst<noinclude />:#switch: {{{group|}}}
    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman
    | lower-alpha
    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}

    | note
    | upper-alpha
    | upper-roman

    | lower-greek
    | lower-roman = {{{group|}}}
    | #default = lower-alpha
   }}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

</noinclude>
